email.paid.adminIntro: Payment for the following SignXpert order has been received successfully.
email.paid.adminFollowup: The customer completed the payment via their My Orders page.
email.paid.adminProceed: Please proceed with processing the order.
email.paymentReceived.successfullyReceiv: We have received your payment for the following order:
email.paymentReceived.checkStatus: You can check the detailed status of your order at any time in your account.
email.password.subject: SignXpert - Password recovery for
email.password.title: Password recovery for SignXpert
email.password.heading: Reset password
email.password.requestIntro: We have received a request to reset your SignXpert password.
email.password.securityNote: For security reasons, we recommend changing the password immediately after logging in.
email.password.inYourAccount: to your account to update your password.
email.password.ifNotRequest: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.
email.welcome.subject: Welcome to SignXpert. Your account is ready!
email.welcome.heading: Your account is ready! Welcome to SignXpert
email.welcome.excited: We are pleased to welcome you to SignXpert.
email.welcome.accountCreated: Your account has been created successfully and you can now start designing your projects.
email.welcome.editorPitch: Our online editor is available directly in your browser - the fastest way to create your custom signs online.
email.adminRegister.title: New customer registration
email.adminRegister.heading: A new customer has registered
email.adminRegister.intro: A new customer has registered on the SignXpert website.
email.adminRegister.tellUsHeader: How the customer heard about us:
email.adminRegister.fullProfileNote: The full customer profile can be viewed in the admin area.
email.adminNewOrder.heading: New order received
email.adminNewOrder.intro: A new order has been placed on the SignXpert website.
email.created.subject: SignXpert - Order received
email.created.title: SignXpert order confirmation
email.created.heading: Your order has been received - SignXpert
email.created.thankYou: Thank you for your order - we greatly appreciate your trust in SignXpert.
email.created.body1: We have received your order and will review the project details for accuracy. If we have any questions, we will contact you.
email.created.followStatus: You can track the status of your order at any time in your account.
email.created.whereYouCanView: where you can view the following:
email.created.contactCorrection: If you notice any errors or corrections are needed, please contact us as soon as possible.
email.created.shipmentReady: As soon as your order has been produced, packed and shipped, you will receive a separate email with your tracking number. The invoice will be attached to that email.
email.created.anyQuestions: If you have any questions or need assistance, our team will be happy to help at any time.
email.invoice.subject: SignXpert - Invoice
email.invoice.title: Your invoice is ready - SignXpert
email.invoice.heading: Your invoice is ready - SignXpert
email.invoice.thankYouOrder: Thank you for your order with
email.invoice.attached: Your invoice is attached to this email.
email.invoice.viewSettleIntro: You can also view and pay your invoice at any time via our website:
email.invoice.simplyLogInNavigate: Simply log in and go to:
email.invoice.selectClickPay: Select the relevant order and click
email.invoice.multiplePaymentMethods: Several secure payment methods are available directly in your account.
email.invoice.bankTransferQuote: If you prefer to pay by bank transfer, please use the bank details provided on the invoice and make sure to quote the following:
email.invoice.helpAllocate: This helps us allocate your payment correctly.
email.invoice.updateBilling: If you would like to update your billing address or the email address used for receiving invoices, you can do so here:
email.invoice.alreadyPaidDisregard: If you have already completed the payment, please disregard this message. You can check your payment status at any time in your account under
email.invoice.headingAttached: Your invoice is ready and attached to this email
email.invoice.simplyLogInGoTo: Simply log in and go to:
email.invoice.alreadyPaidDisregardPaymen: If you have already completed the payment, please disregard the payment information.
email.invoice.shippedHeadingLine1: Your order has been shipped via UPS
email.invoice.shippedHeadingLine2: and is on its way to you.
email.invoice.trackBelow: You can track your order directly on the UPS website by clicking the link below:
email.invoice.upsActiveNote: Please note that it may take some time for the tracking number to become active in the UPS system.
email.invoice.checkDetailedStatus: You can also check the detailed status of your order at any time in your account.
email.invoice.thankYouEnjoy: Thank you for choosing SignXpert - we hope you enjoy your custom signs!
email.invoice.questionsAssistance: If you have any questions or need assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.
email.invoice.appreciate: We greatly appreciate your trust and look forward to working with you again.
email.delivered.subject: SignXpert - Order delivered
email.delivered.title: Your order has been delivered - SignXpert
email.delivered.heading: Your order has been delivered
email.delivered.goodNewsDelivered: Your order has been delivered successfully.
email.delivered.hopeExpectations: We hope everything meets your expectations and that you are satisfied with your custom signs.
email.delivered.askForReview: We would be very grateful if you could take a moment to leave us a review - your feedback helps us continuously improve our service.
email.delivered.contactIfUnusual: If you notice anything unusual or have any questions, please do not hesitate to
email.delivered.usHelp: us - we are always happy to help.
email.delivered.welcomeBack: We look forward to welcoming you back soon and helping you with your next custom project.
email.errorDelivery.subject: SignXpert - Delivery problem
email.errorDelivery.title: Delivery problem notification
email.errorDelivery.heading: Problem with your delivery - action required
email.errorDelivery.carrierReport: The shipping carrier has reported a problem with the delivery of your order.
email.errorDelivery.mayOccur: This may be due to one of the following reasons:
email.errorDelivery.contactConfirm: Please contact us as soon as possible to confirm the correct delivery details or resolve the issue.
email.errorDelivery.updateCarrier: We will inform the shipping carrier immediately so that your order can be delivered without further delay.
email.reminder.subject: SignXpert - Friendly payment reminder: invoice
email.reminder.title: Payment reminder
email.reminder.heading: Friendly reminder - your invoice is due
email.reminder.enjoyingSigns: We hope you are enjoying your custom signs!
email.reminder.outstandingNote: This is simply a friendly reminder that the invoice for your last order (order no. {orderNumber}) is still outstanding. If you have already made the payment, please ignore this message. Your invoice is attached to this email.
email.reminder.appreciateBusiness: We greatly appreciate your trust and look forward to working with you again soon!
email.reminder.paymentStatusNote: You can check your payment status at any time in your account under
email.contact.adminIntro: You have received a new message via the contact form.
email.contact.userSubject: SignXpert - We have received your message
email.contact.userReceived: We have received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible.
email.contact.copyHeading: Here is a copy of your message:
email.contact.urgentNote: If your enquiry is urgent, you are welcome to contact us directly by phone.
pdf.invoice.title: INVOICE
pdf.invoice.onlinePaymentLine1: If you would like to pay by card or another available online payment method, please visit:
pdf.invoice.onlinePaymentLine2: Log in to your account and go to:
pdf.invoice.onlinePaymentLine3: Select the relevant invoice and click "Pay now" to complete your payment securely.

pdf.deliveryNote.noSignsForOrder: No sign details are available for this order.
pdf.deliveryNote.footerCheck: Please check the delivery upon receipt.
pdf.deliveryNote.footerIfIssues: If any items are missing, damaged or incorrect, please inform us by email at the address above.

email.printed.subject: SignXpert - Order confirmation
email.printed.title: Order confirmation - SignXpert
email.printed.heading: Your order has been confirmed - SignXpert
email.printed.reviewIntro: We have received your order successfully and are now carefully checking all project details to make sure everything matches your requirements. Once the check is complete, your order will go straight into production.
email.printed.shipmentReady: As soon as your order has been completed, packed and is ready for shipping, you will receive another email with your tracking number.
email.printed.anyQuestions: If you have any questions or need assistance, our team will be happy to help at any time.
email.shipped.subject: SignXpert - Order shipped
email.shipped.title: Your order has been shipped - SignXpert
email.shipped.heading: Your order has been shipped - tracking available
email.shipped.shippedVia: Your order has been shipped via UPS and is on its way to you.
email.shipped.trackBelow: You can track your order directly on the UPS website by clicking the following link:
email.shipped.upsActiveNote: Please note that it may take some time for the tracking number to become active in the UPS system. Once it is active, you can follow the route of your parcel and view the current status.
email.shipped.checkStatus: You can also check the detailed status of your order at any time in your account.
email.shipped.thankYouEnjoy: Thank you for choosing SignXpert - we hope you enjoy your custom signs!
email.shipped.dontHesitate: If you have any questions or need assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.
